title: Arena Regen
description: Arena regen is a Plugin for 1.21.x that lets you restore the original area of your map without lag. Made for duels and practice servers but works for minigames, Pvp events, and build servers. You can save the region and auto clear aswell.
body:
### Arena Regen
Arena Regen is a lightweight, and reliable Minecraft plugin designed to create regions and track block changes. 

This plugin is useful for,PvP maps, minigame servers, or building competitions, Arena Regen offers a hassle free, chunked restoration system that automatically reverts block modifications on demand or on a scheduled timer.


### **Commands**
- /pos1 - Sets the first position of the region (must be looking at a block).
- /pos2 - Sets the second position of the region.
- /create <name> - Creates a tracked region using the set pos1 and pos2.
- /clearmap <name> [time] - Instantly clears modified blocks in a region. If [time] (e.g., 5m, 10s, 1h) is provided, schedules a recurring clear task.
- /clearstop <name> - Stops an automated clearing task for the specified region.
- /delete <name> - Completely deletes a region and all its tracking data.
- /displayregion <name> - Shows the borders of a region with happy villager particles for 5 seconds.
- /spawn - Clears the player's inventory, removes potion effects, and teleports them back to the world spawn.
- Permissions - All commands require the duels.admin permission (except /spawn, which anyone can use).
- 


### Features
Smart Block Tracking: Changes like block breaking, placing, bucket usage (water/lava), explosions, and burning are automatically tracked in real-time within your defined regions.
Chunked Restoration: Instead of rolling back thousands of blocks in a single server tick (which causes massive lag spikes), Arena Regen restores blocks over a smooth, 10-second window, preserving server performance and TPS.
Easy Region Management: Select pos1 and pos2 via commands (while looking at blocks) and create an unlimited number of tracked regions.
Automated Clearing: Schedule tasks to automatically clear specific regions every 5m, 1h, or 30s with a simple command, or clear them instantly.
Lightweight & Efficient: The plugin has a remarkably low footprint and uses optimized asynchronous scheduling to handle heavy block operations.

## Limitations & Best Practices
Make sure not to create overlapping regions to prevent unintended cross-region block tracking.
The chunked rollback system takes roughly 10 seconds to execute, spreading out block updates. Players within the region shouldn't experience lag.
Version Support
Arena Regen supports Minecraft 1.21.x (including 1.21.4, 1.21.5, up to 1.21.11)
DM neverfakee on discord for inqueries
